text:
The paper exists with this exact title on arXiv and in the NeurIPS 2019 proceedings. The authors listed on arXiv are "Yaqi Duan and 2 other authors." The automated checker flagged "Tracy Ke" vs. "Zheng Tracy Ke" — this is a minor name formatting difference (the full name includes the given name "Zheng"), not a fabricated author. The venue and year also match perfectly.

VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists with the exact title in NeurIPS 2019 proceedings and on arXiv (arXiv:1811.02619), authored by Yaqi Duan, Zheng Tracy Ke, and Mengdi Wang. The author discrepancy ("Tracy Ke" vs. "Zheng Tracy Ke") is a minor name truncation, not a fabrication.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/1811.02619
